name: support-storm
description: Simulate support emails, reviews, refunds, and confused complaints a launch or feature change will generate, then identify the product fixes that cut maintenance drag.

interface.shortDescription: Simulate support emails, reviews, refunds, and confused complaints a launch or feature change will generate, then identify the product fixes that cut maintenance drag.
interface.longDescription: Simulate support emails, reviews, refunds, and confused complaints a launch or feature change will generate, then identify the product fixes that cut maintenance drag. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Use the Support Storm skill for this task.
